title: Simple Bazookas
body:
Just adds a craftable 3D functional bazooka to the game that uses TNT as ammo.

Use it to blast the Ender Dragon or even have fun roleplaying with your friends.

<details>
<summary>Click here to see the crafting</summary>
  
![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1zRIibxP/images/467b0dc480fcfb63246aa0a0ee33450f4df5344c.png)

</details>

**Also try [Luish's Guns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/luishs-guns)!**
